name: Sunbelt Pawn Jewelry & Loan #6
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop chain operating 14+ locations across Houston, Dallas, Irving, and Fort Worth since 2006, offering collateral-based loans, jewelry repair, and merchandise sales.
description_long:
Sunbelt Pawn is a family-owned and locally operated pawn shop business that has served the Texas community since 2006. The company began with a single location on 34th Street and Ella Boulevard in Houston and has expanded to over 14 locations across the Houston, Irving, and Dallas/Fort Worth markets. The expansion reflects their success in building customer trust within their service areas.

Sunbelt Pawn offers traditional pawn shop services including collateral-based loans, jewelry repair, FFL firearms transfers, and merchandise sales. Customers can pawn items for immediate cash or purchase pre-owned merchandise including luxury handbags, fine jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, audio equipment, electronics, and power tools. They maintain an online shopping platform and eBay store for extended reach.

The company positions itself as distinct from typical pawn shops by emphasizing professional service, community dignity, and confidentiality. Their website highlights treating all customers with respect and marketing themselves as highly professional and experienced. They support community through scholarship programs and maintain a 5-star service commitment. Customer reviews indicate satisfaction, with their flagship location (#1) showing a 5.0 rating across 2,468 reviews.

As a pawn shop, Sunbelt Pawn serves customers needing immediate cash against collateral rather than traditional credit assessment. The business model is straightforward: customers receive loans based on item value with the option to reclaim merchandise or allow forfeiture. While they meet a legitimate financial need for unbanked populations, pawn loans carry the inherent risk of asset loss and are significantly more expensive than traditional personal loans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 19 convenient locations across Houston, Dallas, Irving, and Fort Worth for accessibility
Long operational history since 2006 demonstrates business stability and customer trust
Immediate cash available without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Diverse merchandise inventory including luxury goods, jewelry, firearms, electronics, and tools
FFL transfer services available for firearms
Active community engagement including scholarship programs
High customer satisfaction with 5.0 rating and 2,468+ reviews on flagship location
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral with risk of permanent asset loss
No interest rate or fee information disclosed on website, preventing cost comparison
Limited loan terms typical of pawn industry—generally 30-90 days with high fees relative to item value
Website does not provide APR, payment schedules, or transparent pricing structure
Not suitable for credit building or establishing credit history
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash without credit approval
People with valuable items they can temporarily surrender as collateral
Customers seeking to buy quality pre-owned merchandise at discounted prices
Those needing short-term bridge loans between paychecks
diagnosis: Sunbelt Pawn is appropriate for consumers needing immediate cash without credit qualification who possess valuable items to use as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term financing—missing payment terms results in permanent loss of the pledged item, and the effective cost per dollar borrowed far exceeds personal loans or credit alternatives.
services: Merchandise sales (luxury handbags, fine jewelry, firearms, musical instruments)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4750 E Belknap St, Haltom City, TX 76117
